commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh As I live, says the Lord GOD, surely because my flock became a prey, and my flock became food to every beast of the field, because there was no shepherd, neither did my shepherds search for my flock, but the shepherds fed themselves, and fed not my flock; No shepherd. Pastors who seek only their temporal advantage, (1 Timothy vi. , and Titus i. ; Haydock) are hirelings; and if they teach false doctrine, they are wolves, John x. (Worthington).
